name: @xpert-ai/plugin-motion
description: Motion app plugin for agent-generated animated HTML, launch video compositions, motion recipe routing, reviewable versions, and exportable artifacts.
author: XpertAI

interface.shortDescription: Agentic animated HTML and launch video composer
interface.longDescription: Create, route, review, edit, version, and export Motion artifacts from natural-language intent. Includes Motion Assistant, middleware tools, recipe library, HTML Workbench, and browser MP4 export for launch-video compositions.
defaultPrompt: Create a Motion HTML hero for this product brief.
Turn this launch announcement into a short kinetic video.
Search Motion recipes and propose a tasteful animation direction.

contents.name: motion-agent-skill
contents.description: Skill for using Motion middleware tools, recipe selection, HTML/runtime editing, launch-video composition, versioning, export, and recovery.

contents.name: motion-assistant
contents.description: Assistant template for Motion artifact creation and review workflows.

contents.name: motion
contents.description: Use Motion Assistant with Workbench and Agent middleware tools for animated HTML and launch video compositions.

operations.name: create-motion-projects
operations.description: Create reviewable animated HTML and launch-video projects.

operations.name: save-motion-versions
operations.description: Persist working artifacts, versions, styles, exports, and action logs.

operations.name: review-motion-workbench
operations.description: Open Motion Workbench to inspect, edit, export, and restore artifacts.

contents.name: motion_workbench
contents.description: Workbench view for Motion projects, recipe library, HTML editing, video composition, versions, and exports.

contents.name: MotionMiddleware
contents.description: Assistant middleware tools for recipe search, project creation, artifact saving, versioning, exports, status updates, and failure reporting.
